texto: The symbol of the Lotus flower gives a precious teaching that can inspire us to deal with life in the best possible way. Its roots take nourishment from muddy waters and yet bloom in full delicacy and beauty on the surface. Similarly, to have a positive mindset is a beautiful quality; nonetheless to be transformational it needs to be rooted firmly in reality to then blossom with the value which can be created from the muddy problem(s)
explicacao: Citação de Dorotea Brandin sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The symbol of the Lotus flower gives a precious teaching that can inspire us to deal with life in…” articula motivacao, business, communication em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e mudanca.

texto: No matter what we do, each instant contains infinite choices. What we choose to think, to say or to hear creates what we feel in the present moment, it conditions the quality of our communication and in the end the quality of our everyday life. Beliefs and attitudes are made of thoughts. Negative thoughts can be changed and by doing so we create for ourselves more pleasant inner states and have a different impact on the people around us
explicacao: Citação de Dorotea Brandin sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “No matter what we do, each instant contains infinite choices. What we choose to think, to say or …” articula reflexao, attitude, awareness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
